scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:bff && npm run lint:python
scripts.lint:python: uvx --from ruff==0.14.0 ruff check backend/app backend/tests worker/worker_app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:frontend && npm run typecheck:bff && npm run typecheck:python
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:python
scripts.format:python: uvx --from ruff==0.14.0 ruff format backend/app backend/tests worker/worker_app
scripts.format:check: npm run format:web:check && npm run format:python:check
scripts.format:python:check: uvx --from ruff==0.14.0 ruff format --check backend/app backend/tests worker/worker_app
